programme.title: Angry Planet | Kenya
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Here’s the deal: Mt. Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Here’s the first kicker: High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave – a cave created by the most unique form of erosion – Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with their tusks in order to eat the salty rock. Here’s the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus – the world’s most deadly virus. So here’s the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: Metroland
programme.desc: After ten years absence Toni, Chris's best friend, suddenly reappears in London to bring chaos and doubt into Chris's calm, tranquil, slightly boring, predictable life. Chris starts to remember his carefree youth as a photographer in Paris when he lived with and enjoyed a torrid affair with Annick. It was also in Paris that he first met and fell in love with Marion. The temptations and pressure exerted on Chris by Toni to return to their former carefree life of sex, drugs and rock'n'roll soon starts to have an impact on Chris's marriage. He starts to question his values, his lifestyle choices and his relationship with Marion and even suspects her of starting an affair with Toni whom she dislikes! Eventually circumstances come to a head and Chris is forced to decide whether to follow Toni back to the hedonistic, irresponsible life of his youth or face the harsh realities of the present and stay with Marion.

programme.title: The Dead Girl
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, a story about a dead girl, told in five chapters. A woman, miserable in her circumscribed life caring for her domineering mother, finds a body. Somehow, this discovery allows her to change. At the morgue, the sister of a girl missing for 15 years believes the body is that of her sister; this liberates her. An older woman, married to a man who pays her little attention, finds evidence in a storage unit; how will she handle it? The mother of the dead girl, who left home some years before, visits the last place her daughter lived and makes her own discoveries. Last, we flash back to the victim's final day.

programme.title: AFTCO Original Film
programme.desc:
The highs and lows of fishing teach us to ride the wave, and the captains, mates, and everyday Costa Rican citizens have a phrase for such a mindset – “Pura Vida.” Those two words are more of a cultural ethos than a casual expression, and a reminder to remain smiling, thankful, and to never sweat the small stuff.
For the crews and anglers of Los Sueños, the good days far outweigh the bad. Nestled inside a small nook of Playa Herradura, Costa Rica’s Los Sueños Resort and Marina serves as a luxury embarkation point for some of the world’s most heralded bluewater fishing. Many places tout similar claims, but numbers don’t lie: It is common for a single boat to release over a dozen marlin in a single day, and the area holds perhaps the largest concentrations of big Pacific sailfish anywhere.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Huckberry's flagship adventure series is back in Japan and the DIRT crew is hungry as ever for adventure. This time, they’re diving into the Kansai region—where millennia-old traditions flow from the shore of Lake Biwa to surf breaks on the coast. Chef Coleman Griffin gives them a taste of the deep cultural immersion that inspires his culinary practice, from chef knives descended from samurai swords to fermented carp that went on to spawn sushi. And turns out, the perfect meal does exist, and the crew knew it as soon as they had a bite of their final omakase.

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.desc: If you’ve ever heard, seen, or dreamed of the term van life, there is one man to thank for that, and his name is Foster Huntington. programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: This episode of The Big Reveal showcases high-performance tools and innovations built for critical moments—from Jersey T…

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: For the first time in Surviving Mann history, the contestants undergo intense combat training led by none other than Ken Shamrock—"the most dangerous man in the world." His relentless situation drills push this elite group beyond their limits, sharpening their instincts and forging next-level tactical readiness. As a new mission begins to take shape, the pressure mounts—and the team learns that the strongest among them will earn a game-changing reward. But in a world where every edge matters, not everyone is built to keep up. Fatigue sets in, tensions rise, and the difference between teammate and competitor begins to blur. With Shamrock watching closely, only the most disciplined will rise to meet the challenge—and prove they’re worthy of what lies ahead.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The contestants of “Surviving Mann” are handpicked for their exceptional skills and determination. Under the guidance of survival expert Don Mann, they face a series of challenges designed to push them beyond their limits. Each contestant must adapt, innovate, and collaborate to survive in an unforgiving environment. As the grueling challenges unfold, they discover new strengths and forge deeper bonds. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with intense tests of endurance, strategy, and resilience, with Don Mann inspiring and pushing them every step of the way.
